productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue and cream V-neck sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Sweater from united colors of benetton for men. Crafted with exquisite threading techniques, this sweater has a narrow silhouette, perfect for the modern urban male. Wear it with a crisp shirt from arrow, corduroy trousers and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
